zh.lifeSummary: 當Randall Woodward於大約1340年出生在英國英格蘭爾沙文頓 姆 格雷斯迪時，他的父親Robert Woodward II35歲，母親Juliana Woodnett22歲。他於大約1369年與Eva Brow在英國爾沙文頓 姆 格雷斯迪結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1430年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾分頓享年91歲。

nameMeanings.name: Woodward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a forester employed to look after the trees and game in a forest, Middle English woodward (from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + weard ‘guardian, protector’).

History: Henry Woodward emigrated from England in 1635 and settled first in Dorchester, MA, and subsequently in Northampton, MA. He had many prominent descendants. Another Henry Woodward, born c. 1646 in the British West Indies, was the first English settler in SC (1664).

variants.name: Woodard
meanings: from the Norman Old French personal name Odard, Udard, Middle English Wodard, Wudard. It derives from the ancient Germanic name Authard, Othard, Odard, composed of the elements aud- ‘riches' + hard- ‘hard, bold’.
occupational name from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + herde ‘herd’ (Old English wudu + hierde), for a person who tended animals pastured in woodland.

variants.name: Woodworth
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Woodward or Wadworth, the latter being a habitational name from Wadworth in Yorkshire, which is derived from the Old English personal name Wada, Wadda + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Woodman
meanings: occupational name for a woodcutter or a forester (compare Woodward ), from Middle English wodeman ‘woodman’. In some instances this may be a variant of Wadman .
from the Middle English personal name Wudemann (Old English Wuduman, from wudu ‘wood’ + mann ‘man’).

nameMeanings.name: Randall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

variants.name: Randell
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

variants.name: Randle
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

variants.name: Randel
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

en.lifeSummary: When Randall Woodward was born about 1340, in Shavington cum Gresty, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Woodward II, was 35 and his mother, Juliana Woodnett, was 22. He married Eva Brow about 1369, in Shavington cum Gresty, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1430, in Shevington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Randall Woodward est né environ 1340, à Shavington cum Gresty, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Woodward II, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Juliana Woodnett, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Eva Brow environ 1369, à Shavington cum Gresty, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1430, à Shevington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Randall Woodward(이)가 대략 1340년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 샤빙턴 c 그레스티에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Woodward II(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana Woodnett(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1369년 영국 체실르 샤빙턴 c 그레스티에서 Eva Brow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 셰빙턴에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Eva Brow aproximadamente 1369, em Shavington cum Gresty, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Randall Woodward родился около 1340 г. в местности шавингтон кум грести, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Woodward II было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana Woodnett, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Eva Brow около 1369 г. в местности шавингтон кум грести, чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1430 г. в местности шевингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год.
